title: Zhuangzi 2: The Equality of Things
description: Zhuangzi's radical relativism: all distinctions — right/wrong, self/other, life/death — dissolve in the Tao.
introduction: Zhuangzi's radical relativism: all distinctions — right/wrong, self/other, life/death — dissolve in the Tao.

translation.original_text: 天地與我並生，而萬物與我為一。
translation.text: Heaven and Earth were born together with me, and the ten thousand things and I are one.
